│                        ││                                                    │
│    Ralph               ││ Config (editing: Repo)                             │
│                        ││ Save: ctrl+g global • ctrl+r repo • ctrl+d clear s │
│ │ Dashboard            ││                                                    │
│ │ Overview of Ralph a… ││   Layer                                            │
│                        ││     Global                                         │
│   Run Loop             ││   > Repo                                           │
│   Run loop controls    ││     Session                                        │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Build Specs          ││   Project Type                                     │
│   Specs builder        ││   Source: default                                  │
│                        ││   > code (default)                                 │
│   Task Builder         ││     docs                                           │
│   Queue task builder   ││                                                    │
│                        ││   UI Theme                                         │
│   Pin                  ││   Source: default                                  │
│   Pin manager          ││   > classic                                        │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   ••                   ││                                                    │
╰────────────────────────╯╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

ctrl+q quit • ctrl+n toggle nav • ctrl+f toggle focus • ctrl+h toggle help …
